title: Processing & Data Transformation
description: SQL, Spark, Flink, dbt, orchestration, batch vs stream, distributed-compute tradeoffs

lessons.title: Why Processing Architecture Matters
lessons.description: Unified vs specialized processing paths; materialized views, event-driven projections, operational data products

lessons.title: Batch Processing with Apache Spark
lessons.description: Spark Operator on K8s, DataFrame API, Spark SQL; failure modes: data skew, small files, shuffle amplification

lessons.title: Stream Processing with Apache Flink
lessons.description: Stateful streaming, windows, exactly-once, event time, watermarks, late-arriving data, checkpoint recovery

lessons.title: SQL Transformation & Pipeline Orchestration
lessons.description: dbt as transformation framework, Airflow as orchestrator; pipeline SLAs, retry behavior, freshness guarantees

lessons.title: Processing Decision Framework
lessons.description: Comparing engines by workload fit: Spark, Flink, dbt, Ray; language/runtime dimension; cost tradeoffs
